overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic commercial complex. The journey begins in a vibrantly lit corridor with shifting neon colors, transitions through an indoor plaza with a large 'CIRRUS COLA' advertisement, continues through crowded pedestrian corridors with vending machines, and ends at an outdoor plaza at sunset with palm trees and a city skyline.

lighting shifts from green to yellow and red tones

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the end of the corridor

large purple advertisement with 'SET SAIL' text
rectangular ceiling lights running the length of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic corridor with vividly colored reflective flooring that shifts between purple, green, and red hues. Large advertisements line the walls including a prominent 'SET SAIL' poster. The camera moves steadily forward toward a distant doorway while the lighting dynamically changes colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: large indoor lobby with giant beverage advertisement

events.description: exits the narrow colorful corridor into a spacious lobby area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large CIRRUS COLA sign at the far end of the lobby

notable_agents.action: person walking through side corridor on the left

entered.detail: massive illuminated red and blue sign with 'CIRRUS COLA' text
dark metal grate flooring in the lobby area
rectangular panels in the ceiling showing greenery above

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow corridor into a spacious lobby featuring a massive 'CIRRUS COLA' advertisement on the far wall. The flooring changes to dark metal grates, and the ceiling features panels displaying greenery. The lighting becomes more subdued and naturalistic compared to the previous neon corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded pedestrian corridor with digital ceiling displays

events.description: corridor becomes more crowded with pedestrians walking in both directions

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded corridor passing people on benches and walking

notable_agents.action: person with red mohawk and green glasses walking toward camera

entered.detail: illuminated ceiling panels displaying various images and advertisements
white benches along the right wall with people sitting
construction barriers with red and white stripes

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a long, enclosed pedestrian corridor with digital displays on the ceiling and benches along the walls. The crowd density increases with people walking in opposing directions and others sitting on benches. The floor is concrete with scattered trash, and the walls feature large fashion advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: vending machine area near building exit

events.description: bright natural light becomes visible from the outdoor exit ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past vending machines and arcade games toward the outdoor exit

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench reading a book

entered.detail: row of illuminated vending machines with various products
gaming machines with glowing screens and stools
metal barricade with 'NO ENTRY' text in red
service counter with stacks of boxes and a vendor behind it

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into an area with numerous vending machines and arcade games on the left side. A 'NO ENTRY' barricade stands on the right near a service counter. The lighting begins to change as the exit to the outdoors approaches, with warm sunset light visible through the opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza at sunset with palm trees and city views

events.description: exits the building into the outdoor plaza with orange sunset sky
transition from artificial indoor lighting to natural sunset illumination

agents.ego_description: walking out into the open plaza and looking around at the sunset skyline

notable_agents.action: jogger in white top running across the plaza

entered.detail: tall palm trees silhouetted against the orange sky
distant futuristic city buildings with lights visible on the horizon
open concrete pedestrian area with scattered litter
large illuminated advertisement screen showing animated content

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the commercial complex into Westbrook Plaza, an open outdoor area bathed in warm orange sunset light. Tall palm trees line the plaza, and the distant city skyline is visible against the dusk sky. The environment shifts from enclosed artificial lighting to open natural twilight, with sparse pedestrians and joggers moving through the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial complex that gradually opens into a sprawling outdoor plaza at sunset. It begins in a futuristic corridor with reflective flooring shifting between purple, green, and red hues, moving past a prominent Set Sail poster toward a distant doorway. As the camera emerges from the narrow passage, the space expands into a spacious lobby with dark metal grates and a massive Cirrus Cola advertisement, where the lighting shifts from vivid neon to a more subdued, naturalistic tone. The scene then transitions into a crowded pedestrian corridor lined with fashion advertisements and digital ceiling displays before passing a row of vending machines and arcade games. Finally, the enclosed artificial environment gives way to the open air of Westbrook Plaza, where the lighting transforms into a warm orange glow illuminating tall palm trees and a distant city skyline under a twilight sky.
